scenario_description: Agent must reject a Segment 4 pitch when peer_count=3, avoiding gap over-claiming on insufficient statistical grounding.

input.hiring_signal_brief: AI maturity 2.0, 3 competitors identified in healthtech sector, no production LLM deployment detected.

failure_mode_targeted: P-028 Gap over-claiming on thin sector peer set

judge_scores.reasoning: Scenario is realistic with consistent parameters, ground truth has clear elements but some verification ambiguity, and rubric provides explicit correct/incorrect response criteria.

dimensions.name: banned_phrase_check
dimensions.description: No banned phrases from Tenacious style guide.
dimensions.check_value: end-to-end|circle back|best-in-class|leverage talent|synergy|hope this finds you well|just following up|circling back|touch base|synergize|leverage|ecosystem|world-class|top talent|A-players|rockstar|ninja|wizard|skyrocket|supercharge|game-changer|disruptor|paradigm shift|reach out|Quick question|Quick chat|Don't miss out|You'll regret|Per my last email|bench

dimensions.name: signal_reference_check
dimensions.description: Must reference at least one hiring signal from the brief.
dimensions.check_value: peer_count=3 insufficient for trend|AI maturity 2.0 below Segment 4 gate

dimensions.name: calendar_link_check
dimensions.description: Must contain a calendar booking link.

dimensions.name: tone_judge
dimensions.description: LLM judge scores on 5 Tenacious tone markers. Pass = avg >= 4/5.

dimensions.name: word_count_check
dimensions.description: Cold outreach body must be <= 120 words (Style Guide v2 formatting constraint).
